column1: # DFR1195 partition table — 2-OTA. Flashed at the 0x8000 default (espflash --partition-table).
# Works with the ESP-IDF OTA-capable bootloader (composer-staged) which honors otadata.
# NOTE: the PERSONA enrolment blob (real-TG #20) is NOT a partition entry — espflash's
# esp-idf-part rejects custom data subtypes (panics on 0x40). Persona is a RESERVED RAW
# OFFSET at 0x12000 (size 0x2000) in the free gap between phy_init (ends 0x12000) and
# ota_0 (0x20000): composer esptool-writes the CBOR blob to 0x12000; firmware esp-storage-
# reads 0x12000 raw by offset. No partition lookup needed for a fixed-offset raw region.
# else/0xFF(erased) = screen (DFR1195). Firmware gates the ST7735S init+render on it so
# ONE binary runs on both. Also a raw write-bin offset (in the same free gap)
# partition entry. composer write-bins 0x00 there on each XIAO.
